'''dhadasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:doco|doco]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-d-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:doco|doco]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhadasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhædæshæth|dhædæshæth]] || [[word:dhædæshæj|dhædæshæj]] || [[word:dhædæshæsh|dhædæshæsh]] || [[word:dhædæshæ|dhædæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhadadashath|dhadadashath]] || [[word:dhadadashaj|dhadadashaj]] || [[word:dhadadashash|dhadadashash]] || [[word:dhadadasha|dhadadasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhadashath|dhadashath]] || [[word:dhadashaj|dhadashaj]] || [[word:dhadashash|dhadashash]] || [[word:dhadasha|dhadasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhadafshath|dhadafshath]] || [[word:dhadafshaj|dhadafshaj]] || [[word:dhadafshash|dhadafshash]] || [[word:dhadafshaf|dhadafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhadashatha|dhadashatha]] || [[word:dhadashaja|dhadashaja]] || [[word:dhadashasha|dhadashasha]] || [[word:dhadashaka|dhadashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhadashath|dhadashath]] || [[word:dhadashaj|dhadashaj]] || [[word:dhadashash|dhadashash]] || [[word:dhadasha|dhadasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhadashathal|dhadashathal]] || [[word:dhadashajal|dhadashajal]] || [[word:dhadashashal|dhadashashal]] || [[word:dhadashakal|dhadashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhadashathatha|dhadashathatha]] || [[word:dhadashajaja|dhadashajaja]] || [[word:dhadashashasha|dhadashashasha]] || [[word:dhadashaka|dhadashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhadashathan|dhadashathan]] || [[word:dhadashajan|dhadashajan]] || [[word:dhadashashan|dhadashashan]] || [[word:dhadashakan|dhadashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhadashathaoro|dhadashathaoro]] || [[word:dhadashajaoro|dhadashajaoro]] || [[word:dhadashashaoro|dhadashashaoro]] || [[word:dhadashakaoro|dhadashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
